name: WAF Payload Arsenal
description: Your arsenal for WAF security testing - 2,155+ comprehensive payloads for automated vulnerability testing. Interactive CLI for easy use with Claude Code, ChatGPT, and security workflows.
author: Security Research Community
features: 2,155 organized security payloads across 12 attack types
XSS (681), SQLi (148), Command Injection (125), SSRF (72), SSTI (62), and more

ai_integration.description: Can be invoked by AI assistants for automated security testing workflows
